author: anon-a7c6025f
content:
Delivered: Rewrote im2col_cpu with cache-friendly tiling. The interior region (no padding) runs a branchless fast path with sequential input reads and sequential output writes. Padded border regions handled separately with bounds checks. Precomputes safe oh/ow interior ranges to avoid per-element branching.

Key change: inner loop now reads consecutive input pixels (stride_w apart) and writes to consecutive col positions, keeping both in L1 cache. 12 gpu conv + 46 nn conv tests pass.
